<section id="epub2text-documentation">
<h1>epub2text Documentation</h1>
<p>A niche CLI tool to extract text from EPUB files with smart cleaning capabilities.</p>

<section id="features">
<h2>Features</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>Smart Navigation Parsing</strong>: Supports both EPUB3 (NAV HTML) and EPUB2 (NCX)
navigation formats</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Multiple Extraction Modes</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li><p>Chapter-based extraction with selective range support</p></li>
<li><p>Page-based extraction (using EPUB page-list or synthetic pages)</p></li>
<li><p>Project Gutenberg format output with proper formatting</p></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Interactive Terminal Reader</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li><p>Vim-style navigation (j/k, Space/b, n/p for chapters)</p></li>
<li><p>Bookmark support with automatic resume</p></li>
<li><p>Adjustable page size and content width</p></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Flexible Output Formatting</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li><p>One paragraph per line with customizable separators</p></li>
<li><p>One sentence per line using spaCy NLP</p></li>
<li><p>One clause per line (split at commas, semicolons)</p></li>
<li><p>Automatic line splitting at clause boundaries for long lines</p></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Smart Text Cleaning</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li><p>Remove bracketed footnotes (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[1]</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[42]</span></code>)</p></li>
<li><p>Remove page numbers (standalone, at line ends, with dashes)</p></li>
<li><p>Normalize whitespace and paragraph breaks</p></li>
<li><p>Preserve ordered lists with proper numbering</p></li>
<li><p>Optional front matter/TOC filtering</p></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Rich Interactive UI</strong>: Beautiful terminal output with tables and tree views</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Pipe-Friendly</strong>: Works as both CLI tool and Python library</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Nested Chapter Support</strong>: Handles hierarchical chapter structures</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Full Dublin Core Metadata</strong>: Extract all EPUB metadata fields</p></li>
<li><p><strong>URL Support</strong>: Extract text directly from EPUB files hosted online</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="quick-start">
<h2>Quick Start</h2>
<p>Install epub2text:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>epub2text
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Extract text from an EPUB file:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span>extract<span class="w"> </span>book.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Extract by pages:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span>extract-pages<span class="w"> </span>book.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>List chapters:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span>list<span class="w"> </span>book.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>List pages:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span>pages<span class="w"> </span>book.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Read interactively:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span><span class="nb">read</span><span class="w"> </span>book.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Show metadata:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span>info<span class="w"> </span>book.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
